panels.description: Median latencies per module shown throughout the "lifetime" of a log line, ignoring wait and transport times.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
      'Median Latency' AS value,
      (
            SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0)
            FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
            WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
      ) AS "LogServer",
      (
            SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0)
            FROM logline_stage_latency_values
            WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
      ) AS "LogCollector",
      (
            SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0)
            FROM logline_stage_latency_values
            WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
      ) AS "BatchHandler",
      (
            SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0)
            FROM batch_stage_latency_values
            WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
      ) AS "Prefilter",
      (
            SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0)
            FROM batch_stage_latency_values
            WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
      ) AS "Inspector",
      (
            SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0)
            FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
            WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
      ) AS "Detector";

panels.title: Relative module latency

panels.description: Comparison of the median latencies per module.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT *
FROM (
SELECT 'LogServer' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Collector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
)
WHERE name IN (${include_modules:csv});

panels.title: Duration per phase

panels.description: Latency of all modules combined. Approximated through the medians of all single latencies per module.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'Including transport and wait time' AS name, sum(median) AS median
FROM (
SELECT 'LogServer' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'LogCollection' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Between BatchHandler and Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS median
FROM (
      SELECT dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
      FROM batch_tree bt1
      INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
              ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
      WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
        AND bt1.status = 'completed'
        AND bt2.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
        AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
        AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
        AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Between Prefilter and Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS median
FROM (
      SELECT dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
      FROM batch_tree bt1
      INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
              ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
      WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
        AND bt1.status = 'finished'
        AND bt2.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
        AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
        AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
        AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Between Inspector and Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS median
FROM (
      SELECT dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
      FROM batch_tree bt1
      INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
              ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
      WHERE bt1.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
        AND bt1.status = 'finished'
        AND bt2.stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
        AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
        AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
        AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
      AND dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) > 0
)
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Excluding transport and wait time' AS name, sum(median) AS median
FROM (
SELECT 'LogServer' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'LogCollection' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
);

panels.title: Total latency

panels.description: Average time for alert-producing requests. Uses exact LogServer intake to alerter processed timestamps when mapping data exists; otherwise falls back to historical collector-to-alert latency plus average LogServer latency.

targets.rawSql:
WITH alert_message_ids AS (
    SELECT
        toUUIDOrNull(JSONExtractString(server_message_id)) AS message_id
    FROM alerts
    ARRAY JOIN JSONExtractArrayRaw(result) AS warning
    ARRAY JOIN JSONExtractArrayRaw(warning, 'server_message_ids') AS server_message_id
    WHERE alert_timestamp >= $__fromTime
      AND alert_timestamp <= $__toTime
)
SELECT avg(dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, ste.timestamp)) AS "Average alerting request roundtrip latency"
FROM alert_message_ids ami
INNER JOIN server_logs sl
        ON ami.message_id = sl.message_id
INNER JOIN server_log_terminal_events ste
        ON ami.message_id = ste.message_id
       AND ste.stage = 'pipeline.alerter'
       AND ste.status = 'processed'
WHERE ami.message_id IS NOT NULL
  AND ste.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND ste.timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND ste.timestamp > sl.timestamp_in;

panels.title: Average alerting request roundtrip latency

panels.description: Average LogServer-to-terminal-stage latency for all completed logevents. Uses exact mapped terminal events when available; otherwise falls back to historical collector-terminal latency plus average LogServer latency.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT if(isFinite(mapped.average_latency_us), mapped.average_latency_us, if(isFinite(fallback.average_latency_us), fallback.average_latency_us, 0)) AS "Average all logevents roundtrip latency"
FROM (
    SELECT avg(latency_us) AS average_latency_us
    FROM (
        SELECT
            message_id,
            dateDiff('microsecond', start_timestamp, terminal_timestamp) AS latency_us
        FROM (
            SELECT
                sl.message_id AS message_id,
                min(sl.timestamp_in) AS start_timestamp,
                max(terminal.terminal_timestamp) AS terminal_timestamp
            FROM server_logs sl
            INNER JOIN (
                SELECT
                    sltl.message_id AS message_id,
                    max(lt.timestamp) AS terminal_timestamp
                FROM server_log_to_logline sltl
                INNER JOIN logline_timestamps lt
                        ON sltl.logline_id = lt.logline_id
                WHERE lt.is_active = false
                GROUP BY sltl.message_id

                UNION ALL

                SELECT
                    message_id,
                    max(timestamp) AS terminal_timestamp
                FROM server_log_terminal_events
                GROUP BY message_id
            ) terminal
                    ON sl.message_id = terminal.message_id
            GROUP BY sl.message_id
        )
        WHERE terminal_timestamp >= start_timestamp
          AND toDate(terminal_timestamp) >= toDate($__fromTime)
          AND toDate(terminal_timestamp) <= toDate($__toTime)
          AND terminal_timestamp >= $__fromTime
          AND terminal_timestamp <= $__toTime
    )
    WHERE latency_us > 0
) mapped
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT avg(latency_us) AS average_latency_us
    FROM (
        SELECT
            dateDiff('microsecond', collector_started_at, terminal_timestamp) + server_latency_us AS latency_us
        FROM (
            SELECT
                lt.logline_id AS logline_id,
                minIf(lt.timestamp, lt.stage = 'log_collection.collector' AND lt.status = 'in_process') AS collector_started_at,
                maxIf(lt.timestamp, lt.is_active = false) AS terminal_timestamp,
                any(server_latency_us) AS server_latency_us
            FROM logline_timestamps lt
            CROSS JOIN (
                SELECT if(isFinite(avg(latency_us)), avg(latency_us), 0) AS server_latency_us
                FROM server_log_latency_values
                WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime)
                  AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
                  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime
                  AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
            ) server_latency
            GROUP BY lt.logline_id
        )
        WHERE collector_started_at > toDateTime64(0, 6)
          AND terminal_timestamp >= collector_started_at
          AND toDate(terminal_timestamp) >= toDate($__fromTime)
          AND toDate(terminal_timestamp) <= toDate($__toTime)
          AND terminal_timestamp >= $__fromTime
          AND terminal_timestamp <= $__toTime

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            dateDiff('microsecond', timestamp_in, timestamp_failed) + server_latency_us AS latency_us
        FROM failed_loglines
        CROSS JOIN (
            SELECT if(isFinite(avg(latency_us)), avg(latency_us), 0) AS server_latency_us
            FROM server_log_latency_values
            WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime)
              AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
              AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime
              AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
        ) server_latency
        WHERE timestamp_failed >= timestamp_in
          AND toDate(timestamp_failed) >= toDate($__fromTime)
          AND toDate(timestamp_failed) <= toDate($__toTime)
          AND timestamp_failed >= $__fromTime
          AND timestamp_failed <= $__toTime
    )
    WHERE latency_us > 0
) fallback;

panels.title: Average all logevents roundtrip latency

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    end_timestamp AS time,
    latency_us AS value
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(end_timestamp) AS time_bucket,
    if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS value
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket;

SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS "Median"
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT
    end_timestamp AS time,
    latency_us AS value
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(end_timestamp) AS time_bucket,
    if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS value
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket;

SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS "Median"
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT
    min(latency_us) AS "Minimum",
    if(isFinite(avg(latency_us)), avg(latency_us), 0) AS "Average",
    max(latency_us) AS "Maximum"
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT
    min(latency_us) AS "Minimum",
    if(isFinite(avg(latency_us)), avg(latency_us), 0) AS "Average",
    max(latency_us) AS "Maximum"
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT
    end_timestamp AS time,
    latency_us AS value
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(end_timestamp) AS time_bucket,
    if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS value
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket;

SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS "Median"
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT
    end_timestamp AS time,
    latency_us AS value
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS "Median"

WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT
    min(latency_us) AS "Minimum",
    if(isFinite(avg(latency_us)), avg(latency_us), 0) AS "Average",
    max(latency_us) AS "Maximum"
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT

    max(latency_us) AS "Maximum"
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime;

SELECT
    end_timestamp AS time,

WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

SELECT

panels.title: Transport and wait time between stages

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND bt1.status = 'completed'
  AND bt2.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(time) AS time_bucket,
    if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS value
FROM (
SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND bt1.status = 'completed'
  AND bt2.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
)
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket;

SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND bt1.status = 'finished'
  AND bt2.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(time) AS time_bucket,
    if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS value
FROM (
SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND bt1.status = 'finished'
  AND bt2.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
)
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket;

SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND bt1.status = 'finished'
  AND bt2.stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) > 0
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(time) AS time_bucket,
    if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS value
FROM (
SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND bt1.status = 'finished'
  AND bt2.stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) > 0
)
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket;

SELECT
    min(value) AS "Minimum",
    if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS "Median",
    if(isFinite(avg(value)), avg(value), 0) AS "Average",
    max(value) AS "Maximum"
FROM (
SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND bt1.status = 'completed'
  AND bt2.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
);

SELECT
    min(value) AS "Minimum",
    if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS "Median",
    if(isFinite(avg(value)), avg(value), 0) AS "Average",
    max(value) AS "Maximum"
FROM (
SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND bt1.status = 'finished'
  AND bt2.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
);

SELECT
    min(value) AS "Minimum",
    if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS "Median",
    if(isFinite(avg(value)), avg(value), 0) AS "Average",
    max(value) AS "Maximum"
FROM (
SELECT
    bt2.timestamp AS time,
    dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
FROM batch_tree bt1
INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
        ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
WHERE bt1.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND bt1.status = 'finished'
  AND bt2.stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
  AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) > 0
);
